title: Hacken - Rekt
relevance_summary: Compromised bridge private key leading to token minting abuse

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints large quantities of tokens within a short timeframe

red_flags: Large quantity token minting in a short period
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints large quantities of tokens within a short timeframe
summary: Hacken's bridge private key was compromised, allowing attackers to mint 900 million tokens, causing a significant price drop and financial loss. A guard could have detected this by blocking large token mints within a short time frame.
